name: karpathy
description: Operationalizes Andrej Karpathy's four LLM-coding principles as Claude Code tools. /karpathy:audit reviews a CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md instruction file for principle coverage and file quality; /karpathy:diff reviews an in-progress code change before you commit it, catching scope creep, drive-by refactors, unexplained deletions, over-engineering, and missing verification. Both report findings with severity and apply fixes only on approval.
